task_completion.description: Open the initial loan portfolio spreadsheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet application (e.g., LibreOffice Calc) is open displaying the file 'loan_portfolio_partial.xlsx'.

task_completion.description: Calculate the monthly payment for the loans.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Monthly Payment' column in the spreadsheet is populated with values or formulas.

task_completion.description: Calculate the risk score, risk category, and expected loss.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Risk Score', 'Risk Category', and 'Expected Loss' columns are populated with values or formulas.
The 'Portfolio Summary' sheet is active and its cells are populated with aggregated data.

task_completion.description: Save the completed spreadsheet to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The spreadsheet window title shows 'loan_portfolio_complete.xlsx' (or '.ods'), or a 'Save As' dialog is visible saving the file to '/home/ga/Documents/loan_portfolio_complete.xlsx'.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical spreadsheet application to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a spreadsheet GUI (like LibreOffice Calc), not just a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass manual spreadsheet calculations.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are shown running Python scripts or commands to generate the completed spreadsheet.

integrity.description: The agent used spreadsheet formulas to calculate the values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar in the spreadsheet application shows actual formulas being entered or used, rather than hardcoded final answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The initial file is '/home/ga/Documents/loan_portfolio_partial.xlsx' containing exactly 20 loans.
